title: Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:SWG-TheRuinsofDantooine.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Galaxies:
The Ruins of Dantooine'' |author=*[[Voronica Whitney-Robinson]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *[[W. Haden Blackman]] {{ID|Haden Blackman}} |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |early release= |release date=[[December 30]], [[2003]]{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/190140/the-ruins-of-dantooine-star-wars-galaxies-legends-by-voronica-whitney-robinson/9780345470669|text=The Ruins of Dantooine: Star Wars Galaxies Legends}} {{C|Paperback}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=*Paperback *eBook |pages=304 |isbn=9780345470669 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] |series=[[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] |preceded by="[[Pearls in the Sand]]" |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] novel written by [[Voronica Whitney-Robinson]], with [[W. Haden Blackman]]. It is based on the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], and it was first published by [[Del Rey]] on [[December 30]], [[2003]]. A prequel short story titled "[[Pearls in the Sand]]" was written by Whitney-Robinson and published in [[2004]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''It is a time of great turmoil. The oppressive Empire is close to seizing complete control of the galaxy. The ragtag guerrilla army of the Rebel Alliance fights on, striking wherever it can, but now something has come to light that could spell certain doom. Hidden in the Jedi ruins of Dantooine is a Holocron containing a list of high-level Rebel sympathizers. If that list were to fall into the hands of Darth Vader, the Rebel Alliance would lose its most valued support—and possibly the war itself.'' ''As an Imperial bioengineer who frequently visits other worlds, Dusque Mistflier is the perfect cover for a Rebel who needs to travel far and wide without arousing suspicion. And so she agrees to help Rebel spy Finn Darktrin in his quest to recover the crucial Holocron. Despite help from Han, Luke, and Leia, the mission is fraught with peril. And as their journey takes them into the fiery belly of the beast that is galactic civil war, Dusque and Finn will learn that the hardest part of all is figuring out whose side you're on—and how far you're willing to go to win....'' ==Plot summary== Though [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineer]] [[Dusque Mistflier]] has no love of the Empire, she has not joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cause. She and her partner, the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Tendau Nandon]], continue to catalog and study [[Living Force/Legends|life]]-forms of diverse shapes and sizes. While on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], Dusque meets a handsome yet overbearing [[Gender/Legends|man]], [[Finn Darktrin]], who reveals himself to be a Rebel sympathizer who needs her help leaving the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Rattled by the encounter, Dusque stews over Finn's request while carrying out a biological mission on Naboo's [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. Returning to Naboo, Dusque is shocked to see Tendau coldly [[Death/Legends|executed]] by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who declared him a Rebel [[Agent/Legends|agent]]. Though Dusque didn’t know everything about Tendau, she knows he did not deserve a cruel fate. She chooses to help Finn – and by extension, the Rebel Alliance – to avenge Tendau's death. Finn seeks a missing Rebel Alliance [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] that contains the names of high-level Rebel agents and sympathizers. This record was lost by the Rebels who abandoned the [[Dantooine base/Legends|Dantooine outpost]]. Finn first voyages to the moon of [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], where he hopes to [[Currency/Legends|cash]] in a favor to him by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]]. Nym gives Finn and Dusque a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], which they pilot to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. Their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] is shot down by Imperials and crash-lands into the surface on Corellia. Dusque and Finn are retrieved by Rebels, and at the temporary Alliance base on Corellia, they meet [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The Rebels explain that the holocron is secreted somewhere among the ruins of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Finn and Dusque comb the remains of the ancient [[Jedi Enclave|Jedi base]] on Dantooine, locating the holocron. Here, Finn reveals his true allegiance. He is an Imperial agent. Refusing to let the vital Rebel information reach Imperial hands, Dusque destroys the holocron before Finn is able to transmit it to the Empire. Finn and Dusque part ways, with Dusque returning to the Alliance. Finn must report his failure to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], but the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] does not slay him. Vader senses a powerful core of anger in Finn that may prove useful in the future. ==Development== ''The Ruins of Dantooine'' was the first tie-in novel specifically developed for a ''[[Star Wars]]'' videogame, complete with the [[LucasArts]] name and the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' logo on the cover. In [[2003]], LucasArts and [[Wikipedia: Daybreak Game Company|Sony Online Entertainment]] released the first ever ''Star Wars'' massively multiplayer online [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying game]], and this tie-in book spotlighted many of the game's features. The locations visited in the novel – [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], [[Rori/Legends|Rori]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], and [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] – were all places featured in the game. ==Continuity== The book's story included “side quests,” with [[Dusque Mistflier|Dusque]] undertaking [[Zoologist/Legends|zoological]] missions or looking for minor artifacts, in order to advance the plot. Much like ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' itself, the novel focused on new characters but featured guests appearances by such luminaries as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. ==Media==
